Custom Arbor Day Banner Design for Tree Planting & Environmental Events

Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

Make the most of your Arbor Day celebration with an eye-catching custom banner that promotes environmental awareness and tree planting activities. From community tree planting events and Earth Day festivals to Arbor Day 5K races and environmental fundraisers, we help you create visibility for your cause with professionally designed Arbor Day banners that withstand outdoor weather conditions.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver an Arbor Day banner that you're proud to display at your environmental event. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your eco-friendly vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of outdoor banner printing and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made Arbor Day banner that promotes your environmental message effectively.

We offer a wide selection of custom Arbor Day banners and environmental signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and flexible production times to ensure your Arbor Day banner is delivered when you need it for your tree planting event. Browse our Arbor Day banner templates or upload your custom environmental design today.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you create the perfect Arbor Day banner.

Looking for something more specific? Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request. Ideal for large-scale environmental events, unique display requirements, and bulk quantity orders for multiple Arbor Day celebrations.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vinyl Banner Material for Weather-Resistant Arbor Day Displays

Six Customizable Banner Materials

Your Arbor Day banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that showcase your environmental message. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your Arbor Day banner needs to be precise for specific display requirements, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material for Arbor Day events. It has a low shine and rich color gamut that makes environmental graphics and tree imagery stand out beautifully.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics perfect for eye-catching Arbor Day messaging.

18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material for long-term outdoor Arbor Day displays. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and superior print quality in all weather conditions.

Mesh Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh Arbor Day banners are ideal for windy outdoor tree planting events and construction sites.

Fabric Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor Arbor Day presentations and environmental education displays with a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces for temporary Arbor Day event signage.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Outdoor Arbor Day Banner Installation

Arbor Day Banner Finishing Options

Hems & Grommets Reinforced Hems Reinforced Corners Pole Pockets
These are a one inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2–4 feet for secure outdoor mounting. A thick, weblike material is heat-welded to the perimeter to provide additional reinforcement for long-term outdoor display. A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to improve strength and durability in the corners where stress occurs during outdoor installation. A sleeve added to allow for a dowel or pole to run through for support during tree planting events.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all outdoor Arbor Day banners to increase durability against weather and wind.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for Arbor Day banners displayed between trees or posts.

All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted for maximum durability during outdoor environmental events.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of your Arbor Day banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your Arbor Day banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength for outdoor Arbor Day displays and are grommeted to each corner of the banner for secure installation.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the banner for extended outdoor use during tree planting seasons.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided Arbor Day banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Arbor Day Banner Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Artwork Guidelines

The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your Arbor Day artwork files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you optimize them for banner printing.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your Arbor Day banner order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your Arbor Day artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your Arbor Day project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific environmental branding. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production & Turnaround Times for Custom Arbor Day Banners

Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for your Arbor Day banner order. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your environmental event timeline, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your Arbor Day banner delivered.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight for tree planting events. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option for urgent Arbor Day celebrations.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your Arbor Day banners quickly? The express option is ideal.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option for Arbor Day events. Free and speedy for most custom environmental banner orders.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you're planning your Arbor Day celebration well in advance, you can save money by choosing our 5-Day Saver option.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Arbor Day Banner Payment & Ordering Options

Payment

All Arbor Day banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your Arbor Day banner order.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Custom Arbor Day Banner Delivery

General Shipping Guidelines

If you have any questions about shipping your Arbor Day banners, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your Arbor Day banner package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large Arbor Day banner orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the Arbor Day banner is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

International Shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

Shipping Maps

Vinyl Banners & Mesh Banners

This product is produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial based on customer location and product specifications.

Fabric Banners

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods:

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping, please add additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5–10 days depending on destination.

Order Custom Arbor Day Banners for Your Environmental Event

High-quality, high-resolution, and full-color Arbor Day banners take your tree planting event to the next level. At banners.com, we offer all that and more, like quick delivery and outdoor durability perfect for environmental celebrations. Request a quote and start your Arbor Day banner design today.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Arbor Day Banner Questions & Answers

What materials work best for outdoor Arbor Day events?

For outdoor tree planting events and Arbor Day celebrations, we recommend our 13 oz or 18 oz vinyl materials for durability, or mesh banners for windy conditions. All materials are weather-resistant and designed to withstand outdoor environmental conditions.

Can I use Arbor Day banner templates or upload my own design?

Yes! You can browse our collection of Arbor Day banner templates, upload your own print-ready environmental design, or work with our professional designers to create a custom Arbor Day banner that matches your event branding.

How quickly can I get my Arbor Day banner for my tree planting event?

We offer production times from 1-5 business days, depending on your needs. If you have an urgent Arbor Day celebration, our 1-day priority option ensures your banner is ready quickly.

What sizes are available for Arbor Day banners?

We offer Arbor Day banners ranging from 1'x1' up to 8'x50', with custom sizing available for larger environmental events. Contact us for oversized banner requirements for major tree planting ceremonies.

Are your Arbor Day banners environmentally friendly?

Our banners are manufactured in the USA using high-quality materials designed for durability and longevity, reducing the need for frequent replacements. We also offer fabric options for indoor environmental displays.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
